Overview
Build a trustworthy experimentation platform for AI product learning at very high scale.
Responsibilities
  • Own reliable distributed services.
  • Build production observability and incident response.
Qualifications
Required
  • Production coding experience in C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python.
  • Experience operating large-scale cloud systems.
Other Requirements
  • Pass required security screening.
Preferred
  • Experimentation platforms and A/B testing.
  • Distributed tracing and reliability engineering.

Software Engineering IC5 - The typical base pay range for this role is USD $117,200 - $229,200 per year.

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis.

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. Boilerplate.
